signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence**[2]

Solana network achieved a record 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, 2026, coinciding with today's date and driven by the anticipated **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** reducing transaction finality to 150 milliseconds

signals.headline: US and Iran weighing fresh peace talks to extend two-week ceasefire before April 21 expiry amid naval blockade tensions
signals.raw:
US and Iran weighing fresh peace talks to extend two-week ceasefire before April 21 expiry amid naval blockade tensions | YES | MED confidence** [2][4]
